_meta.resume_note: Pinned to Riverside City College's official archived 2025-2026 CurriQunet catalog. The Biology AS-T is extracted; the official degree index does not list a separate general local Biology AS or AA.

degrees.degree_title_seen: Biology - Associate in Science for Transfer (ADT) - AS768 (CalGETC)
degrees.tmc_version_basis: The 2025-2026 catalog requires Calculus I and one complete two-course physics sequence, matching the prior Biology TMC rather than Biology 2.0.
degrees.catalog_status_seen: Published in the official archived 2025-2026 catalog; no inactive or teach-out language is displayed.

sources.locator: 2025-2026 archived CurriQunet catalog > Associate Degree for Transfer > Biology - Associate in Science for Transfer (ADT) - AS768 (CalGETC)

major_groups.choice_structure_seen: Complete either BIO 60 or BIO 60H, plus BIO 61.

courses.title_seen: Introduction to Molecular and Cellular Biology
Honors Introduction to Molecular and Cellular Biology
Introduction to Organismal and Population Biology

major_groups.choice_structure_seen: Complete either CHE 1A or CHE 1AH, and either CHE 1B or CHE 1BH.

major_groups.label_seen: Electives — select one complete physics sequence
major_groups.choice_structure_seen: Complete PHY 2A and PHY 2B, or complete PHY 4A and PHY 4B; courses may not be mixed across sequences.

major_groups.label_seen: Transferable electives as needed to complete 60 units

degrees.notes: The catalog reports 32 major units and requires Cal-GETC. The program page does not restate the Cal-GETC subtotal or a fixed elective subtotal, so those units_min values are left null.

notes: The official 2025-2026 degree index lists the general Biology AS-T but no separate general Biology/Biological Sciences local AS or AA; specialized and certificate awards were ignored by scope.
